data.title: SanDisk Corp. stock up 22.38% to $660.00 after second-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings, revenue up 31% to $3.03 billion.
data.description: SanDisk Corp.'s shares, listed on NASDAQ as SNDK, experienced a significant surge, rising by 22.38% to reach $660.00 in overnight trading on Thursday. This increase follows the release of their second-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings report and an announcement about an extension of a joint venture. The stock closed at $539.30 during regular trading hours, marking a 2.21% increase. SanDisk reported a remarkable 31% growth in revenue for the second quarter of 2026, with total revenue reaching $3.03 billion. This demonstrates a substantial increase from $2.3 billion in the previous quarter and a 61% rise from $1.87 billion in the same period last year. The company also noted a significant uptick in non-GAAP diluted earnings per share, which stood at $6.20 compared to $1.22 in the prior quarter and $1.23 a year ago. Additionally, there was a noteworthy improvement in non-GAAP gross margin, which expanded to 51.1%, up by 21.2 percentage points from the first quarter of 2026. Within specific segments, the datacenter sector saw exceptional growth, posting a 76% increase. David Goeckeler, the CEO of the company, commented on these positive developments. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chainlink's oracle network is now being utilized by major financial institutions like UBS, J.P. Morgan, and U.S. Commerce Department, securing $95B.
data.description: In 2025, Chainlink (LINK) has become the leading on-chain finance infrastructure, seeing use by notable institutions including UBS, J.P. Morgan, and the U.S. Commerce Department for its oracle network services. This development highlights the growing prominence of LINK, showcasing its utility and reliability in the financial sector.

data.title: Rogers International Commodity Index (RICI®) Composition remains unchanged post annual meeting, reaffirming founding premise.
data.description: Singapore, January 30, 2026 - The annual meeting of the Rogers International Commodity Index (RICI®) Committee concluded with Jim Rogers and Beeland Interests, Inc. confirming that there will be no changes to the weights or components of the RICI. This decision solidifies the foundational principles of the index and ensures consistency in its composition.

data.title: "New TV series "THE GHOST IN THE SHELL" premieres July 2026 with music staff, key visual, and PV. LOS ANGELES, Jan. 29, 2026."
data.description: The upcoming TV anime "The Ghost in the Shell" has revealed its music staff, first key visual, and promotional video leading up to its premiere in July 2026. This announcement was made on January 29, 2026, in Los Angeles. The anime is set to coincide with the opening of the "Ghost and the Shell: The Ghost in the Shell Exhibition" at TOKYO NODE.

data.title: IN XI'AN partners with ChaHalo to bring Xi'an culture to NY, promoting tea aroma. Cross-cultural feast in NA.
data.description: In a unique cross-cultural event, the ancient tea aroma from Xi'an in China intersected with the lively energy of New York City, creating a shared journey. This event took place on Jan. 29, 2026, highlighting the rich cultural exchange unfolding in North America. The fusion of these two cities brought forth a culinary experience where traditions melded, resulting in a vibrant and diverse feast. This encounter symbolized the blend of histories and flavors, demonstrating the global connection between Xi'an and New York City.

data.title: Griff Green plans to use unclaimed Ethereum from The DAO hack for new security initiative; focus on distribution methods.
data.description: Griff Green stated that although The DAO has a skilled team capable of developing security projects independently, they prioritize devising methods for security distribution.

data.title: Sharon AI to deploy 1K B200 cluster at NEXTDC M3 Data Center in Melbourne, Australia using Lenovo and VAST Data.
data.description: SharonAI Holdings Inc. and its subsidiaries have revealed plans to deploy a 1K B200 cluster at NEXTDC’s Tier IV M3 Data Center in Melbourne, Australia. This move marks a significant collaboration between the companies, including Sharon AI, Lenovo, and VAST Data. The deployment is aimed at delivering advanced accelerated computing infrastructure in the region. NEXTDC's Chief Commercial and Customer Officer, David Dzienciol, expressed enthusiasm about expanding the partnership with Sharon AI and the other involved entities.

data.title: Optimism boosts OP token with buyback plan: half Superchain revenue to repurchase tokens, holding for ecosystem growth. Starting next month.
data.description: Starting next month, the Optimism blockchain will initiate the sale of 50% of its Superchain revenue to repurchase its own token. The repurchased tokens will be retained for potential future use within the ecosystem.

data.title: World's longest saree (4+ km) unveiled in Mumbai by Red Dot Foundation to fight Marital Rape Exception in India.
data.description: In Mumbai, India, the Red Dot Foundation launched a significant campaign unveiling the world's longest saree, measuring over four kilometers in length. This initiative aims to raise awareness and combat the issue of Marital Rape Exception prevalent in India.
